semantic_residual.definition: Local semantic fit to observation/query targets in embedding space

namespace_error.definition: Distance from coarse active namespace shell

corridor_error.definition: Distance from residual admissible semantic corridor

context_velocity.definition: Turn-to-turn or iteration-to-iteration movement in semantic state space

continuity_penalty.definition: Smoothness penalty across semantic transport sequence

structural_drift.definition: Cumulative deviation from residual semantic corridor during optimization

reconciliations.definition: Number of discrete cleanup/retraction events triggered by velocity threshold

verdicts.INVALID_NAMESPACE_DRIFT: State drifts outside both namespace and residual corridor
verdicts.PARTIAL_NAMESPACE_ONLY: State remains in coarse namespace but outside residual corridor
verdicts.FULLY_ADMISSIBLE_NAMESPACE: State remains inside active namespace and residual semantic corridor
